top3.sql:
SELECT MIN(Birthday) 
FROM Patient 
WHERE ID IN (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE GOT > (
        SELECT MAX(GOT) 
        FROM Laboratory 
        WHERE GOT <= (
            SELECT MAX(GOT) 
            FROM Laboratory
        ) / 2
    )
);
